>How-To-Repeat:
>Fix:

diff -urN /usr/ports/devel/p5-Time-Period/Makefile devel/p5-Time-Period/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/devel/p5-Time-Period/Makefile	2012-11-08 05:14:54.000000000 +0900
+++ devel/p5-Time-Period/Makefile	2013-05-14 00:00:49.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,14 +1,11 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	p5-Time-Period
-# Date created:			October 30th, 2000
-# Whom:	      			Nicholas Esborn <nick@netdot.net>
-#
+# Created by: Nicholas Esborn <nick@netdot.net>
 # $FreeBSD: head/devel/p5-Time-Period/Makefile 300896 2012-07-14 13:54:48Z beat $
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	Time-Period
 PORTVERSION=	1.20
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:PRYAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 DISTNAME=	Period-${PORTVERSION}
